## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new team members on GrowthX's customer use cases and work streams, providing context on the company's evolving approach to content strategy and AI SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is focusing on editorial content as the foundation, starting engagements with strategy sprints to ensure alignment and clear roadmaps](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [The company is adapting its approach to meet changing market demands, including concerns about AI search engines impacting traditional SEO](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [GrowthX aims to help customers diversify their digital presence and create content that performs well across various platforms, including AI-powered search](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Evolution and Current Focus

  - [Shifted from offering both editorial and programmatic content to prioritizing editorial](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Now starts engagements with strategy sprints instead of 90-day pilots](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [Focus on helping customers "operate like publishers" with a strong content foundation](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Aim to accelerate customers' organic growth strategies and eventually drive revenue](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)

### Work Streams and Offerings

  - [Editorial content: Primary focus, most mature work stream](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Programmatic content: Currently paused for new sales, needs process improvements](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Link building: Offered for low domain authority sites, partnerships being developed](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [Interview-first long-form content: New offering in beta testing phase](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [Potential future work streams being explored (e.g., AI SEO optimization)](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)

### AI SEO and Changing Search Landscape

  - [Increasing customer inquiries about optimizing for AI search engines](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [GrowthX partnering with Scrunch to track AI search engine rankings](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
  - [Current strategy: Focus on jobs-to-be-done framework and creating high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [Example: Ramp's content ranking well in both Google and AI-powered search (Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)

### Content Strategy and Distribution

  - [Emphasis on diversifying digital presence (YouTube, reviews, social media)](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=1871.0)
  - [Example: Gong's podcast repurposing workflow for extended content distribution](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
  - [Importance of creating content that can be repurposed across multiple channels](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=1964.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue developing methodologies for AI SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [Refine and expand work stream offerings based on market demand and team capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Improve processes for programmatic content to potentially reintroduce the offering](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Further develop partnerships for link building services](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [Explore and define new potential work streams to expand GrowthX's service portfolio](https://fathom.video/share/byWLsb3iWrMLBnzxP2PDYycWNPors3vs?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
